basic_details.job_title: NCL Electrical Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Northern Coalfields Limited (NCL) has published the Electrical Supervisor Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 20 Electrical Supervisor positions. Candidates up to 65 years of age and who are superannuated Electrical Supervisors of NCL with an excellent professional record are eligible to apply offline. The application process is open until 23-06-2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF and apply link below.

qualification.education_qualification: Superannuated Electrical Supervisor of NCL with excellent professional record
qualification.details: Superannuated Electrical Supervisor of NCL with excellent professional record.

salary_details.pay_scale: 50% of last drawn wages (Basic + VDA + SDA) consolidated rounded off to next Rs. 10/- per month
salary_details.details: 50% of last drawn wages (Basic + VDA + SDA) consolidated rounded off to the next Rs. 10/- per month.

selection_process: Assessment based on Physical Attendance (15 Marks) and Annual Confidential Report (ACR) (15 Marks) for preceding 3 years Tie resolution by ACR marks
Date of Appointment Provisional merit panel with reservation Medical Examination (IME) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NCL Electrical Supervisor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nclcil.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NCL Electrical Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of the application form at the Recruitment Department, NCL HQ, is 23rd June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Electrical Supervisor post?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria require candidates to be Superannuated Electrical Supervisors of NCL with an excellent professional record. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Electrical Supervisor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies announced for the Electrical Supervisor post in this recruitment drive by Northern Coalfields Limited.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Electrical Supervisor post is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the NCL Electrical Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Electrical Supervisor position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is 50% of the last drawn wages (Basic + VDA + SDA) consolidated, rounded off to the next Rs. 10/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Electrical Supervisor role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves assessment based on Physical Attendance and Annual Confidential Reports (ACR), followed by tie resolution, a provisional merit panel, medical examination, and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the NCL Electrical Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Northern Coalfields Limited?
faq.answer: The official website of Northern Coalfields Limited is www.nclcil.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NCL/HQ/HR/Fixed term Recruitment/2026/ E-185.
